name: GTCR
overview: Long-tenured Chicago-based buyout firm. 'Leaders Strategy' partners with executives to build companies via thesis-led acquisitions. Significant tech, financial services, and healthcare exposure.
notable: Leaders Strategy: partner with seasoned exec, then back them through a roll-up / platform build
bdNotes: Thesis-led / executive-partnership origination is core. A strong outbound BDM here is sourcing both targets AND the executives who lead the platforms.
